description_long: This obelisk features a geometric, faceted design with a wide, hexagonal base that tapers smoothly into a tall, pointed spire. The entire structure is clad in a wood-textured finish, giving it a warm, natural appearance reminiscent of polished hardwood. The surfaces are flat and angular, with sharp transitions between the base and the shaft, and the wood grain runs vertically along the spire, enhancing its height. The base is broad and stable, with each face subtly angled to create a sense of solidity and permanence. There are no visible inscriptions, carvings, or decorative motifs, resulting in a minimalist and modern aesthetic. The tip is sharply defined, coming to a clean, narrow point without any embellishments.
description: A faceted, wood-textured obelisk with a wide hexagonal base and a tall, pointed spire, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from an angle highlighting three main faces of the base and the vertical wood grain running up the spire.
description_view_1: This view shows the obelisk from a flatter side, emphasizing the broad, angular base and the smooth transition to the spire.
description_view_2: The obelisk is viewed from another angled perspective, revealing the symmetry of the base and the sharpness of the tip.
description_view_3: A direct side view, showcasing the full width of the base and the vertical rise of the spire to its pointed tip.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, hexagonal, and faceted, with flat faces and sharp edges. It is constructed from the same wood-textured material as the rest of the obelisk, with no visible steps, platforms, or decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, faceted, and clean, with no unique features or decorations. It maintains the same wood texture as the rest of the structure.
